creator: diafoirus@gmail.com
text:
Hi, greetings from Pendulo Software family!

Recently we change our domain name from pendulosoftware.com to pendulosoftware.tech, and our new website link is www.pendulosoftware.tech , please update our info.

New company description as follow:

"
Based in Caracas, Venezuela, Pendulo Software provides and specializes in support and consulting for FreeBSD and Linux solutions. We offer onsite as well as offsite support, web development, design (2D and 3D), Multimedia, VPNs implementation, Virtualization, VoIP, high performance servers, Firewalls, custom application programming and many others services. Our experience covers the most important branches of current IT industry, from routine of server management, security audits and updates, to high performance computing and mitigating attacks. For more information about our services, please visit our multilanguage website, send an email to atencioncliente@pendulosoftware.tech or infocorp@pendulosoftware.tech or call us under +58 (212) 625-0708, +1 (407) 536-9895 or +1 (253) 642-6484.  "

Thanks in advance and have a nice day! ...
